title: alpinia intermedia
intro: Alpinia intermedia, also known as Lesser Galangal or Thai Galangal, is a perennial plant belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpinia intermedia include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Alpinia intermedia can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although its essential oil is also used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
